characters.appearance: A fair-skinned human hand with short, unpainted nails. Only the hand and a small portion of the wrist are visible.
characters.wardrobe: No clothing is visible on the wrist.
characters.demeanor: Deliberate and precise, pointing and tapping on specific areas of the screen.

scenes.supernova_script:
Unknown speaker says: Welcome to the interview, there is nothing here to worry about. [Welcome to the interview, there is nothing here to worry about.]
Unknown speaker says: But... how should I answer? [But... how should I answer?]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: feeling nervous in an English interview setting.
- Introduces the app interface where users can tap words to learn their meanings in Hindi.
- Sets a practical, real-world tone aligned with Supernova's focus on career and confidence.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
रोज़ सिर्फ 10 मिनट में Supernova के साथ इंग्लिश बोलना सीखें (Learn to speak English in just 10 minutes a day with Supernova)
AI ट्यूटर के साथ प्रैक्टिस करें (Practice with AI tutor)
रोज़ाना लेसन्स (Daily lessons)
पढ़ें (Read) सुनें (Listen) बोलें (Speak) +150 नए शब्द (+150 new words)
Welcome to the interview, there is nothing here to worry about.
But... how should I answer? I asked, nervously.
I sat before the manager in silence, my confidence dropping and my heart beating faster than ever before.
Though I could not yet understand the questions he asked, I felt that the opportunity behind me had already closed, and another—far more successful—was opening.
worry (चिंता)
answer (जवाब देना)
nervously (घबराहट से)

scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the interactive vocabulary building feature of the app.
- Shows how users can learn pronunciation and meaning in real-time to overcome hesitation.
- Builds confidence by breaking down complex professional sentences into understandable parts.

I sat before the manager in silence, my confidence dropping and my heart beating faster than ever before.
